* * *

# 

What is Clever Certification?

[](#what-is-clever-certification)

This collection of pages provides an overview of the certification processes and requirements for Clever integrations.

> 📘
> 
> ### 
> 
> **New to Clever?**
> 
> [](#new-to-clever)
> 
> If you want to learn more about what Clever is and how it works for app partners and school districts, check out our free training course: [Clever Academy for App Partners](https://clever.academy/ca-app-partners).

Clever aims to help you design and build an excellent integration, ensuring you deliver an unparalleled experience for your users. Our goal is to provide the best possible experience for both your customers and your team when you go live with Clever.

Integrations must be secure, resilient, and scalable. Based on our experience with application partners across the country, we have devised core requirements that integrations must meet to connect with live districts and access production data, including user records and enrollment information.

The specific requirements are detailed in the following pages.

After building and testing your integration with a Clever development app, submit a survey answering key questions about how it works. We will review your survey responses and your integration for architectural best practices.

* * *

# 

Why should I certify?

[](#why-should-i-certify)

-   **Connect with real users**: Gain access to live districts and real user data.
-   **Ease of use**: Simplify processes for your customers.
-   **Compatibility**: Ensure your integration works seamlessly in the Clever ecosystem.
-   **Visibility**: Be featured in the [Clever Application Gallery](https://clever.com/app-gallery).
-   **Recognition**: Earn certification image assets for use on your website.

* * *

# 

Which certification do I need?

[](#which-certification-do-i-need)

To connect with live districts on Clever and obtain a production account, your application must be certified by our Partner Engineering team. The certification process varies depending on the integration type you've chosen. Below are the different certification processes based on the integration type:

1.  [**Clever Library Certification**](https://dev.clever.com/docs/library-certification-guide)
2.  [**Clever Single Sign-On (SSO) Certification**](https://dev.clever.com/docs/district-sso-certification-guide)
3.  [**Clever Secure Sync Certification**](https://dev.clever.com/docs/secure-sync-certification-guide)
4.  [**Clever LMS Certification**](https://dev.clever.com/docs/clever-secure-sync-certification-guide-copy)

If you're unsure which integration type to pursue, use the [Integration Picker](https://airtable.com/shrUp8n3bkdGIBkGh) to help determine the best option for your app.

* * *

# 

How do I get started with my integration?

[](#how-do-i-get-started-with-my-integration)

Once you've selected your integration type, you'll need to collaborate with your development team to start building the integration. Here are some helpful resources to guide you through each integration:

1.  **Review Certification Types**: Visit our [Certification Types](doc:certification-overview) page.
2.  **Choose Your Integration**: Decide which integration you would like to build (see above).
3.  **Follow the Guides**: Refer to the quickstart guides and certification guides below for your chosen integration.

-   [Clever Single Sign-On Quickstart Guide](https://dev.clever.com/docs/district-sso-1)
-   [Clever Single Sign-On Certification Guide](https://dev.clever.com/docs/district-sso-certification-guide)
-   [Clever Secure Sync Quickstart Guide](https://dev.clever.com/docs/secure-sync-rostering)
-   [Clever Secure Sync Certification Guide](https://dev.clever.com/docs/secure-sync-certification-guide)
-   [Clever Library - Overview](https://dev.clever.com/docs/library-sso)
-   [Clever Library Certification Guide](https://dev.clever.com/docs/library-certification-guide)
-   [Clever LMS Connect Quickstart Guide](https://dev.clever.com/docs/clever-lms-connect)
-   [Clever LMS Connect Certification Guide](https://dev.clever.com/docs/clever-secure-sync-certification-guide-copy)

* * *
